issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios, such as handling consent revocation or network failures during consent submission.
The skill contains extensive explanatory text and tables that may be considered verbose for a concise implementation guide.
The skill is tailored to React/Next.js and vanilla JS, lacking guidance for other frameworks or environments.

scenarios.name: gdpr-cookie-banner-with-ga
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes GPC detection, ConsentRecord storage in localStorage and cookie, and applyConsent logic, though the UI rendering is incomplete, whereas Response B lacks GPC handling, cookie storage, and GA consent logic.

scenarios.name: gpc-detection-middleware
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric, while Response B omits the required header, cookie name, consent record creation, and saveConsent logic.
